node.text:
Kylie Jenner and Travis Scott first met at Coachella back in April 2017. Right after the festival, Kylie decided to hopped on Travis’s tour bus because they instantly liked each other and didn’t want their time together to end after the festival since Travis had to continue his tour.
Instead of having a normal second date, Kylie spent time traveling with him across different cities during the tour. She later said this actually helped their relationship grow because they could spend time together away from the intense attention they usually get in Los Angeles.
Because they spent so much time together during that tour, their relationship progressed very quickly. Less than a year after meeting at Coachella, the couple welcomed their daughter Stormi in February 2018. The two were really into each other so much so that they even got matching butterfly tattoos, inspired by Travis’s song “Butterfly Effect.” Their relationship, though, wasn’t always smooth.
They broke up for the first time in 2019 but stayed close while co-parenting Stormi. By 2021, they were back together, and Kylie announced she was pregnant again. Their second child, a son named Aire, was born in February 2022, just one day after Stormi’s fourth birthday. Still, by late 2022, they split once more, this time focusing on co-parenting while keeping a good relationship till this day. Follow me @sp5derk1ng for more 🙏🏾
I’ve got no hope if kylie cheated on 😢
@channy_maria Kristy Sarah got cheated on and she's a whole queen. Humanity and love are lost 🥲😔
